- [ InputMethodKit ](/documentation/inputmethodkit)

-  kIMKCommandClientName 

Global Variable# kIMKCommandClientName

macOS 10.5+

```
let kIMKCommandClientName: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimkcommandclientname#Discussion)

Used to look up the client object; the client conforms to the IMKInputText and NSObject protocols.
